changelog: Adds configurable movie and series exclusions so selected titles are skipped and left untouched by the Hidden tag scan.
description: Automatically manages a 'Hidden' tag for movies and series based on TMDb physical release data.
name: Physical Release Guard
overview: Scans your movie and series libraries and adds or removes a 'Hidden' tag based on whether a physical release exists according to TMDb data. Movies use TMDb physical release dates; series use TMDb DVD/physical episode-group evidence.
